emails.body: Profiles needed for US Weather BP BDD Swap Tana/Kelly/Karen: The product long description below will fall under the new product type US Weather BP BDD Swap. Credit (Tom Moran) has approved copying the profiles for the new product type from the following: US Weather CDD Swap Please respond no later than 11 a.m. on Wednesday, April 18. Thank you. Forwarded by Lisa Lees/HOU/ECT on 04/17/01 10:31 PM Kevin Meredith@ENRON 04/09/01 03:59 PM
